name: Memova Company Memory Book
purpose: Let a Memova team member or authorized agent understand the user manifesto and the current founder wedge in ten minutes while demonstrating Page to Book to Library as a real product output.
authority_rule: CURRENT product decisions take precedence. MANIFESTO defines enduring user value but does not silently override confirmed product scope. OPEN questions are never product facts.

chapters.title: 用户宣言——被记住的未来
chapters.description: The enduring user value and philosophical north star: memory should belong to the person and extend how long that person can continue to be understood.

chapters.title: 第一把尖刀
chapters.description: The concrete founder wedge confirmed on 2026-07-19: transform high-value Context into private, shareable Pages that accumulate into Books and a personal Library.

chapters.title: Why Memova
chapters.description: Stable company principles, the product system, memory authority, and natural interfaces that explain the current direction.

chapters.title: How We Got Here
chapters.description: The May-to-July evolution, supporting evidence, historical explorations, and unresolved decisions.

pages.title: Memova Company Memory Library
pages.summary: The company book opens with Memova's enduring promise and then routes readers to the current founder wedge, the highest-authority product definition.

pages.title: Memova 用户宣言 · 被记住的未来
pages.summary: Memova helps every person turn real Context into memory they own, can understand, can correct, and can keep aligned over time, extending how long a person can continue to be understood.

pages.title: 第一把尖刀
pages.summary: Memova serves founders by turning voice, meetings, ideas, and project context into private Pages that can be saved, shared, or distributed and automatically become a personal library.

pages.title: The Product Model
pages.summary: The MVP contains four objects: Private Page, Shared Page, Distribution Assets, and Book; private memory remains the source while sharing and distribution are controlled projections.

pages.title: Experience and Sharing
pages.summary: Memova generates a private Page first; saving, private sharing, and public distribution are user choices protected by confirmation, version isolation, access control, fallback publishing, and automatic Book formation.

pages.title: Company Foundations
pages.summary: Memova makes personal AI useful through durable individual context, human-led consequential action, local-first memory, and a calm low-cognitive-load interface.

pages.title: The Product System
pages.summary: Page to Book to Library adds a visible memory and sharing loop to Inbox and Brief, Knowledge Base, Agent Hands, and Outputs rather than replacing that system.

pages.title: Memory and Interfaces
pages.summary: Memova accepts natural input, calibrates its understanding of user intent, organizes people, projects, decisions, and commitments, and projects canonical memory into readable HTML; Pen remains an interface exploration.

pages.title: Evolution and Evidence
pages.summary: Natural input, structured memory, Agent Hands, output research, and user-alignment work converged in July around Page as the core object and Book and Library as cumulative memory.

pages.title: Open Questions
pages.summary: This page records only unresolved choices and validation gates while preserving confirmed and explicitly-later boundaries that must not be reopened accidentally.
